calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-14-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name for an Adult and of a Minor.
Dept. 514, Judge: James Robertson, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288

Petitioners Eunpil Cho and Sun Hee Cho were present in pro per as guardian ad litem for and with the minor Hee Eun Cho, were placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication is in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name of the minor were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Namefor the minor to Jennifer Ashlyn Cho.
Decree Changing Name of the minor was submitted to and signed by the Court.
